nasb.text: When Joshua had dismissed the people, the sons of Israel went each to his inheritance to possess the land.

esv.text: When Joshua dismissed the people, the people of Israel went each to his inheritance to take possession of the land.

cnv.text: 約書亞遣散了眾人，以色列人就各歸自己承受的地業，要佔有那地。

ccb.text: 约书亚遣散以色列人后，他们便各自去攻占所分得的土地。
